parameters.description: Send notifications to your own MessageBird SMS destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise msgbird:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MessageBird SMS apikey

source_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's MessageBird SMS source
